hypothesis: right-border hallucination is aspect-ratio-driven, not pixel-count

square.png.verdict: fully suppressed (TR std matches input corner baseline of ~1.0)

hi_mp.png.verdict: partial fix (3x better than control, but still 2x input baseline)

conclusion: aspect-ratio is the primary driver; pixel count is secondary. Rendering at square dims fixes the bug but warps geometry. Need a fix that preserves 16:9 output aspect.
